---
title: "About"
image: profile.png
image-shape: round
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/chelseaparlettpelleriti/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/chelseparlett
    - icon: rss
      text: RSS
      href: index.xml
---

A couple of sentences about who you are and what this blog is about. Replace this paragraph (and the photo, links, and title above) with your own.
